case_title: SAMANTHA MARTINEZ HANSEN ET AL VS. PATRICIA BARLOW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED FEB-06-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ HANSEN, SAMANTHA ANG, BIJOU OLIVERA, GABRIELA SANDERS, MIKAELA AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-09-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY MARTINEZ HANSEN, SAMANTHA ANG, BIJOU OLIVERA, GABRIELA SANDERS, MIKAELA BARLOW, PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-09-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFFS SAMANTHA MARTINEZ HANSEN, BIJOU ANG, GABRIELA OLIVERA AND MIKAELA SANDERS ARE PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). PLAINTIFF GABRIELA OLIVERA STATED HAVING TECHNICAL ISSUE WITH WEB CAMERA (NO VIDEO). DEFENDANT PATRICIA BARLOW IS PRESENT. COURT ALLOWS PLAINTIFFS TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FOR TODAY'S TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS HANSEN, ANG, OLIVERA, AND SANDERS ORALLY STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM FOR TODAY'S TRIAL. DURING SMALL CLAIMS DISCOVERY, DEFENDANT REVIEWED PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS ON FILE (FILED BY PLAINTIFF BIJOU ANG). PLAINTIFFS' HAVE NOT BEEN ABLE TO REVIEW DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN COURT DUE TO APPEARING VIA ZOOM. COURT IS WILLING TO ALLOW A CONTINUANCE FOR PLAINTIFFS TO HAVE ENOUGH TIME TO REVIEW DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS. PLAINTIFFS STATED IN COURT THAT THEY DO NOT NEED MORE TIME TO REVIEW THE EXHIBITS AND AGREE TO MOVE FORWARD TO TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS ARE INFORMED THAT THE COURT WILL ASSIST TO DISPLAY EXHIBITS ON ZOOM CAMERA IF NECESSARY. PLAINTIFF BIJOU ANG'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ HANSEN, SAMANTHA ANG, BIJOU OLIVERA, GABRIELA SANDERS, MIKAELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARLOW, PATRICIA $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
